root_text.ud8.10:1.2: ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme.
root_text.ud8.10:2.1: “Dabbassa, bhikkhave, mallaputtassa vehāsaṁ abbhuggantvā ākāse antalikkhe pallaṅkena nisīditvā tejodhātuṁ samāpajjitvā vuṭṭhahitvā parinibbutassa sarīrassa jhāyamānassa ḍayhamānassa neva chārikā paññāyittha na masi.
root_text.ud8.10:2.2: Seyyathāpi nāma sappissa vā telassa vā jhāyamānassa ḍayhamānassa neva chārikā paññāyati na masi;
root_text.ud8.10:2.3: evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dabbassa mallaputtassa vehāsaṁ abbhuggantvā ākāse antalikkhe pallaṅkena nisīditvā tejodhātuṁ samāpajjitvā vuṭṭhahitvā parinibbutassa sarīrassa jhāyamānassa ḍayhamānassa neva chārikā paññāyittha na masī”ti.
root_text.ud8.10:3.1: Atha kho bhagavā etamatthaṁ viditvā tāyaṁ velāyaṁ imaṁ udānaṁ udānesi:

translation_text.ud8.10:1.2: At one time the Buddha was staying near Sāvatthī in Jeta’s Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s monastery.
translation_text.ud8.10:1.3: There the Buddha addressed the mendicants,
translation_text.ud8.10:2.1: “Mendicants, when Dabba the Mallian rose into the air and, sitting cross-legged in midair, entered and withdrew from the fire element before becoming fully quenched, his body burning and combusting left neither ashes nor soot to be found.
translation_text.ud8.10:2.2: It’s like when ghee or oil blaze and burn, and neither ashes nor soot are found.
translation_text.ud8.10:2.3: In the same way, when Dabba the Mallian rose into the air and, sitting cross-legged in midair, entered and withdrew from the fire element before becoming fully quenched, his body burning and combusting left neither ashes nor soot to be found.”
translation_text.ud8.10:3.1: Then, understanding this matter, on that occasion the Buddha expressed this heartfelt sentiment:
translation_text.ud8.10:4.1: “Just as the glow of iron struck
translation_text.ud8.10:4.2: by a hammer in the fire of Jātaveda
translation_text.ud8.10:5.1: in the same way, for the rightly released,
translation_text.ud8.10:5.2: who have crossed the flood of sensual bonds,

variant_text.ud8.10:8.2: Chaṭṭhamavaggavaranti → chaṭṭhamavaggavaraṁ (bj, mr) | jaccandho → tu tamandho (mr)
variant_text.ud8.10:8.4: Pāṭaligāmiyamaṭṭhamavaggo → pāṭaligāmavaraṭṭhamavaggo (bj, mr); pāṭaligāmiyavaraṭṭhamavaggo (sya-all, km, pts-vp-pli1)
variant_text.ud8.10:9.4: Addhā hi taṁ udānamitīdamāhu → addhā tamudānamitīdamāhu (bj); saddhā hi taṁ udānantidamāhu (sya-all, km, pts-vp-pli1); atthāyetaṁ udānamitimāhu (mr)
